creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
portmgr@ plans to make python3.6 default version of python in the next weeks.

science/agrum fails to package with DEFAULT_VERSIONS=python=3.x

Failure log:

http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/112i386-default-PR234633/2019-01-08_06h30m30s/logs/errors/agrum-0.13.4_2.log
